channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned sofa on Wernbrook street, 6th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned sofa on Wernbrook street, 6th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress on the side of the road, 6th March
item.description:
Dumped mattress on the side of the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abery Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights remain after works have long finished, 6th March
item.description:
Work men have failed to remove the Temp ATS here causing delays
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights not working, 6th March
item.description:
None of the lights in the archways at this location function. This is a safety issue, especially for women walking alonne at night.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jessup Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accumulation of litter along the lane, 6th March
item.description:
General build up of litter along the lane. Crisp Packets, sweet wrappers etc most likely dropped by Coopers School children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bike not parked in designated bay., 6th March
item.description:
Bike partially blocking pedestrian pavement. London borough of Lewisham now states that Lime Bikes must only be parked in designated parking bays. There is a bay 10 yards away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldfield Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On pavement and around the bin, 6th March
item.description:
Dumping rubbish on pavement it’s attracting rats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of potholes, 6th March
item.description:
This whole stretch of road to just before the bend has lots of potholes. There are around 10. They are quite hard to avoid as there are so many of them.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lonsdale Drive, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number of potholes, 6th March
item.description:
Three large potholes have developed on approach to the roundabout and entry to roundabout from eversley park road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eversley Park Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at Winford Court, 6th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped overnight by bin unit at Winford Court, by Martock Court car park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portbury Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste flytipped on Clapton terrace, 6th March
item.description:
Household waste flytipped on Clapton terrace Central bin area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge growing across half of path, 6th March
item.description:
You cannot get past with a pushchair or wheelchair and would have to go into the road. Dangerous when you have young children walking.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollards missing and lamp not working, 6th March
item.description:
This has been reported numerous times to say that the problem is fixed is a joke placing a traffic cone and a yellow light that does not work is not fixed this issue is in cray avenue outside no83
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th March
item.description:
Huge amount of rubbish including black bags a sofa and trollies full of rubbish. Blocked the alleyway entrance so no residents are able to access the back doors. Huge concern over rats which have been in issue for all the residents previously.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park View Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Radboirne close 1-7 E50AN, 6th March
item.description:
This car park there more than 3 months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Radbourne Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish spilled and dumped, 6th March
item.description:
Rubbish bags and rubbish all over floor outside belvedere infant school. Smells bad and is all over floor so nursery kids and youbger kids have step in Also bin is broke

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mitchell Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes left, 6th March
item.description:
Everything out of the bins has been tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 6th March
item.description:
Someone hasn't cleaned up after their dog
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped, 6th March
item.description:
Fridge dumped on grass verge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Little Heath, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet
